name: Castle of Dreams - Iris's Necklace
desc: Special Summon 1 "Castle of Dreams" Illusion monster from your Deck or GY, or if your opponent controls a monster that was Special Summoned from their Deck or Extra Deck, you can Special Summon 1 "Castle of Dreams" Spellcaster monster instead. You can only activate 1 "Castle of Dreams - Iris's Necklace" per turn.
strings: Special Summon 1 Castle of Dreams Illusion or Spellcaster monster
